violations.summary: Government issues an order restricting or penalizing political expression based on its political content or viewpoint, in violation of the highest-protection category of Article V Section 2.6.

satisfied_duties.duty: void the unconstitutional restriction on political speech
satisfied_duties.outcome: voided the restriction on political speech on expedited review

ai_summary.primary_violation: Government issues an order restricting or penalizing political expression based on its political content or viewpoint, in violation of the highest-protection category of Article V Section 2.6.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
